aiSummary: The report scanned 1,607 external sources and 8 GitHub repositories, finding no confirmed variants or new fingerprints. The top issue identified is "False Battery Alert / Missing Battery" (37 occurrences), with a recommended fix to set `get mainsPowered() { return true; }` and remove `measure_battery` in `onNodeInit`. The second most common pattern is "Pairing Failure" (18 occurrences), though no fix details are provided.
